description:
Discovered while sizing fz-ul4.23.6.2 (AOT startup shim). For AOT-compiled binaries to link successfully, the linker needs an archive that provides every fz runtime symbol — fz_alloc_*, fz_arith_*, fz_print_value, fz_spawn, fz_receive_attempt, plus the Process / heap / SchemaRegistry types they touch.

Today those live in the fz binary crate (src/ir_runtime.rs, src/process.rs, src/heap.rs, src/fz_value.rs). The fz-runtime sibling staticlib crate currently holds only an atom table and the old .12-era print helpers (185 lines).

## Deliverable

Move (or re-export) the JIT/interp runtime substrate so the staticlib provides:

  - process.rs (Process, CURRENT_PROCESS, ProcessState, PidId, current_process)
  - heap.rs (Heap, SchemaRegistry, FieldDescriptor, FieldKind)
  - fz_value.rs (FzValue, HeapHeader, HeapKind, Tag, ListCons, debug::render)
  - ir_runtime.rs (all extern \"C\" fns)

Two viable shapes:

A. **Move into fz-runtime**. The most aligned with the \"shared substrate\" project memory. fz binary depends on fz-runtime; staticlib is the canonical home.

B. **Mirror via #[cfg(feature = \"aot-build\")]**. Less invasive but two copies of the truth.

Recommend (A). The mechanical move is substantial (~3,000 lines of file relocations + visibility tweaks) but ends with a cleaner crate boundary.

## Cross-cutting concerns

- runtime.rs::Runtime currently references CompiledModule (codegen-side). Either Runtime moves with the substrate (and the JIT-only fields get gated), or Runtime stays in fz binary and the staticlib exposes the shared bits.
- fz_ir::FnId is used by fz_spawn. Either fz_ir moves too (it's pure data — minimal cost) or FnId becomes a u32 newtype in the staticlib.

## Acceptance

- fz-runtime staticlib exports every fz_* symbol an AOT-linked fz program needs.
- fz binary still builds and `fz run` / `fz interp` / `fz test` are green.
- The JIT continues to use the runtime via the same paths (no perf regression).
- fz-ul4.23.6.2 (startup shim) becomes implementable on top of this.

## Blocks

- fz-ul4.23.6.2 (startup shim)
- fz-ul4.23.6.3 (fz build linker)
- transitively, fz-ul4.23.6.4-.6 and fz-ul4.22 close
title: Move runtime substrate to fz-runtime staticlib (AOT prerequisite)
